Package index

All Functions

Complete list of functions and datasets available in the BayesianEFA package.

befa()
Bayesian Exploratory Factor Analysis
summary(<befa>)
Summary and Print Methods for BEFA Objects
rsp_align()
Efficient Rotation-Sign-Permutation (E-RSP) Alignment
befa_factor_scores()
Bayesian Factor Scores
extract_posterior_draws()
Extract Posterior Draws
posterior_summaries()
Compute Posterior Summaries
befa_fit_measures()
Bayesian Fit Indices for Exploratory Factor Analysis
befa_reliability()
Bayesian Reliability Estimation (McDonald's Omega)
print(<summary.befa>)
Print BEFA Summary
print(<befa_fitmeasures>)
Print Bayesian Fit Measures
HS_data
Holzinger and Swineford (1939) Mental Abilities Dataset
BayesianEFA-package BayesianEFA
The 'BayesianEFA' package.

Developed by Ricardo Rey-Sáez.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
